rationale: Old Hangul гҶ„ for /f/ (NIKL uses г…Қ which loses /f//p/ distinction). 'fish' showcases /f/ + /ЙӘ/ + /Кғ/.
Old Hangul г…ё (light-b) for /v/. Korean г…Ӯ would lose voicing distinction.
Sibyeok г…ј (s+t) for English think-/Оё/. Adjacent /ЕӢ/ вҶ’ гҶҒл°ӣм№Ё вҶ’ мһү. Final /k/ вҶ’ нҒ¬.
Sibyeok г…Ҫ (s+b) for English this-/Г°/. Final /s/ вҶ’ г……л°ӣм№Ё (NIKL-style coda absorption).
Banchieum г…ҝ (vanished sibilant) for /z/. Korean г…Ҳ confuses /z/ and /dК’/.
Old jamo б„¶ for /К’/. /Й‘Лҗ/=гҶҚ + length. Stress not marked here.
Old б„ҫ for /Кғ/. NIKL splits as мӢңмҳӨ (slightly different).
SschangгҶ… for German /x/ (Bach). Word-final вҶ’ not л°ӣм№Ё (NIKL: л°”нқҗ with мңј-syll instead). UHPS-full keeps гҶ….
Yeoeumridi б„ӣ for French uvular /КҒ/. NIKL collapses /r/ /КҒ/ /Йҫ/ all into г„№. Engine composes 'p+a' to нҢҢ.
Nieun-cieuc г…Ҙ for Spanish/Italian palatal nasal /ЙІ/. /ЙІ+a/ palatalizes to ya glide. Stressed on лӮҳ.
Yeo гҶҺ for open-mid back rounded /Й”Лҗ/. NIKL collapses /Й”/ /o/ both вҶ’ г…—.
Arae-a гҶҚ for open back /Й‘Лҗ/. With /f/=гҶ„, length, primary stress, /Г°/=г…Ҫ. Master case.
ЕӢ at coda вҶ’ гҶҒл°ӣм№Ё auto-collapses to standard г…Үл°ӣм№Ё (NFC). Output is plain мӢұ.
Length marker Лҗ kept verbatim. NIKL drops length completely.
Primary stress as middledot В· attached to stressed vowel. middledot is default tone_style.
Secondary stress as Л— (modifier minus). Primary on 'л©”В·мқҙ'. Both stress levels preserved.
High level tone (Mandarin 1м„ұ). arrow style: ВҜ. Default tone_style for tone-bar IPA.
Rising tone (Mandarin 2м„ұ). arrow вҶ—.
Dipping tone (Mandarin 3м„ұ). arrow вҶҳвҶ— shows the fall-rise contour.
Falling tone (Mandarin 4м„ұ). arrow вҶҳ.
Diphthong /aЙӘ/ вҶ’ м•„мқҙ (two syllables in Hangul). 'h' onset.
/eЙӘ/ diphthong вҶ’ м—җмқҙ.
/oКҠ/ вҶ’ мҳӨмҡ°. Korean approximation.
/aКҠ/ вҶ’ м•„мҡ°.
/Й”ЙӘ/ uses гҶҺ for the open-o + г…Ј glide.
/Оё/=г…ј + /r/=г„№ + /iЛҗ/. Cluster with length.
Initial /s/+/t/+/r/ cluster + length + final stop. 't' absorbs as г…Ңл°ӣм№Ё to 'мҠӨ'.
Schwa /Йҷ/ вҶ’ м–ҙ. /v/=г…ё at end. Stress on second syllable.
Rhotic schwa /Йҡ/ вҶ’ м–ҙ (same as plain schwa in UHPS-full). Compare with /Йҷ/ case S29.
French nasal /ЙӣМғ/ вҶ’ г…” + гҶҒл°ӣм№Ё (collapses to г…Үл°ӣм№Ё in NFC). /v/=г…ё. v3.32 fix: _compose_with_jong now accepts гҶҒ via г…Ү remap.
KNOWN GAP: French /Й‘Мғ/ should preserve nasal. Engine: лёҢг„№гҶҚ (no nasal). v3.x todo.
/tsu/ вҶ’ м¶” (Japanese loanword convention). NIKL: мё мҡ° separated; UHPS-full: contracted to м¶”.
/dК’/ вҶ’ г…Ҳ. /Й‘Лҗ/=гҶҚ. Word-final /z/=г…ҝ.
/tКғ/ вҶ’ г…Ҡ. /iЛҗ/. /z/=г…ҝ at end.
Initial cluster /br/, length, final /Г°/=г…Ҫ.
garage: schwa, stress, /Й‘Лҗ/=гҶҚ length, final /К’/=б„¶.
Greek ОёОөПҢПӮ: /Оё/=г…ј. Stress on second syllable.
Russian Р¶РёСӮСҢ: engine produces 'б„¶мқ•' (with г…Ңл°ӣм№Ё). Spec: palatalized /tКІ/ should be г„·л°ӣм№Ё. v3.x todo.
